entry.title: [WAW1][Infrastructure] - Row W13A / B maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 12, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Apr 14, 13:49 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Infrastructure.

Start time : 12/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 12/05/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : A brief loss of IPMI connectivity may occur.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in WAW1.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [IEB01][Cooling System] - Racks IEB0101C02A Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 5, 07:00 - 15:00 UTC

Apr 15, 14:05 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in rack IEB0101C02A.

Start time : 05/05/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 05/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA/PAR][Network] - Backbone Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 29, 19:00 UTC  -  Apr 30, 04:00 UTC

Apr 16, 18:16 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our backbone infrastructure.

Start time : 29/04/2026 19:00 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : During maintenance, customers may temporarily experience latency between GRA and PAR.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, our teams will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment to improve general performance.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0323A01B maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 29, 04:00 - 15:00 UTC

Mar 9, 15:39 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 29/04/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 29/04/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance operation, our servers will be temporarily unavailable. We invite you to shut down your servers yourself to avoid any inconvenience.
We will make every effort to minimize the duration of the downtime and restore service as quickly as possible.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
